title: PolyTrack
description: Inspired by TrackMania, PolyTrack is a fast-paced, minimalist arcade racing game. Design your own low-poly tracks, customize your formula racing car, and beat world records in lightning speed drives.
controls: WASD or Arrows to drive, R to instant restart, ESC to pause/menus

title: Run 3
description: Run, jump, and drift through an infinite, gravity-defying series of tunnels in outer space. Conquer moving platforms, crumbling tiles, and light-speed gaps in this classic action runner.
controls: Arrow keys or WASD to run and jump, Spacebar to jump higher, rotate screen gravity
